mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.article_id AS articleId, a.title, a.summary, a.cover, u.nickname AS authorName, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, a.created_at AS createdAt, c.created_at AS collectedAt, CASE WHEN a.id IS NULL OR a.is_deleted = true THEN true ELSE false END AS isDeleted FROM tb_collection c LEFT JOIN tb_article a ON c.article_id = a.id LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON a.author_id = u.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_collection WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT c.id, c.article_id AS articleId, a.title, a.summary, a.cover, a.author_id AS authorId, u.nickname AS authorName, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, c.created_at AS collectedAt, CASE WHEN a.id IS NULL OR a.is_deleted = true THEN true ELSE false END AS isDeleted FROM tb_collection c LEFT JOIN tb_article a ON c.article_id = a.id LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON a.author_id = u.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
